fast.identity: driven anime protagonist channeling intense lyric emotion into every frame
fast.silhouette: strong forward-leaning silhouette with kinetic readiness
fast.texture: kinetic {main_color} atmosphere, beat-driven motion, sharp rim contrasts

slow.identity: introspective anime protagonist quietly holding the weight of the lyric's emotion
slow.silhouette: still inward-facing silhouette with deep internal light
slow.texture: minimal motion, slow breathing {main_color} glow, intimate frame depth

medium.identity: anime protagonist shaped by the song's central emotional arc
medium.silhouette: balanced silhouette with expressive hand and gaze language
medium.texture: measured {main_color} rhythm, lyric-tied movement, mid-range cinematic depth

hair_rules.hair: flowing dark hair with gentle {main_color} bloom at the edges
sharp-textured dark hair with aggressive {main_color} color strikes
soft layered dark hair with translucent {main_color} edge light

hair_default: dark hair with restrained {main_color} rim glow shaped by the song's mood

outfit_rules.outfit: dark performance-ready outfit with reflective trim and clean stage lines
dark modern street coat with subtle reflective edge detail
simple layered dark casual wear with soft trim

outfit_default: dark contemporary outfit with subtle {main_color} accent detail

environment_only.identity: song-specific atmospheric environment as the main subject, with no lead human character
environment_only.silhouette: wide cinematic environment silhouette, empty space carrying the emotional focus
environment_only.prop: recurring environmental light motif shaped by {main_color}

object_symbol.identity: song-specific symbolic object as the emotional lead, supported by partial human presence only when needed
object_symbol.silhouette: clear object-led silhouette with the human figure secondary or cropped

human_duo.identity_prefix: two song-specific lead characters with contrasting silhouettes
human_duo.reference_note: Create two distinct leads on the same model sheet; do not merge them into one face.

group.identity_prefix: song-specific small ensemble with one clear center lead and supporting silhouettes
group.reference_note: Create one center lead plus simplified supporting members; keep the center lead consistent.

archetypes: petite soft-faced protagonist with a compact frame and gentle rounded features
tall sharp-featured protagonist with long limbs and a composed angular presence
androgynous street-poet protagonist with a slim frame and quiet guarded expression
mature elegant protagonist with calm eyes, longer proportions, and refined posture
youthful restless protagonist with bright alert eyes and energetic asymmetrical styling
reserved dreamlike protagonist with delicate facial features and a still inward gaze
confident performer-like protagonist with bold posture and clean graphic silhouette
fragile introspective protagonist with narrow shoulders and soft tired eyes
face_shapes: round face, soft cheeks, small nose, wide-set eyes
long oval face, high cheekbones, narrow eyes, straight nose
heart-shaped face, pointed chin, large reflective eyes
square jawline, defined brows, calm heavy-lidded eyes
delicate V-shaped jaw, small lips, slightly upturned eyes
soft rectangular face, low brows, deep-set eyes
youthful short face, bright eyes, rounded chin
slender face, prominent lower lashes, quiet unsmiling mouth
hair_bases: short cropped dark hair with exposed ears
chin-length dark bob with blunt ends
long dark hair tied in a low ribboned tail
shoulder-length wavy dark hair with loose volume
messy wolf-cut dark hair with layered nape
straight dark hair falling past the shoulders
asymmetric undercut with longer dark fringe on one side
soft curly dark hair forming a rounded silhouette
face_marks: small beauty mark under the left eye
single thin eyebrow slit on the right brow
faint under-eye shadows and a sharp lower-lash line
soft round eyes with a tiny catchlight shaped like the song motif
slightly asymmetrical smile with one corner held back
narrow focused eyes and a small bandage across the cheek
gentle downturned eyes with a pale {main_color} rim highlight
clear wide eyes with a short diagonal cheek highlight
hair_variants: one longer side strand crossing the cheek
short tied-back half ponytail with loose front strands
uneven layered fringe parted to the left
soft wolf-cut layers with a lifted crown silhouette
chin-length side locks framing the face
slightly wavy ends with one pinned-back section
messier crown texture with a clean nape line
longer back layers visible behind the collar
body_silhouettes: compact petite body silhouette with small shoulders
tall narrow body silhouette with long legs
relaxed slouched silhouette with guarded shoulders
upright dancer-like silhouette with open chest line
soft rounded silhouette with gentle hand posture
angular fashion-model silhouette with sharp elbows and knees
slim androgynous silhouette with straight coat line
light floating silhouette with long sleeves covering the hands
outfit_bases: oversized hooded coat over slim dark layers
cropped bomber jacket over a high-neck inner shirt
long satin coat with flowing split hem
minimal sleeveless layered tunic over fitted sleeves
structured short jacket with wide trousers
soft cardigan-like coat with loose scarf layers
asymmetric wrap jacket with narrow pants
long school-uniform-inspired coat with modern clean lines
outfit_accents: one asymmetric sleeve strap carrying a tiny {main_color} light
short inner scarf printed with an abstract waveform
single shoulder patch shaped by the song motif
thin translucent oversleeve on one arm
small waist pouch with a glowing zipper pull
open collar with a narrow silver-white inner line
layered hem cut at a diagonal angle
one fingerless glove with a faint {main_color} pulse
accessories: tiny earring on one ear catching the key light
thin choker with a miniature light bead
two small hairpins arranged like a pause mark
single wrist cord tied around the left hand
transparent ID-card charm with no readable text
small ring reflecting the recurring motif
narrow ankle strap visible above one shoe
minimal pendant tucked partly under the collar
gesture_signatures: touches the prop with two fingers before each emotional shift
keeps one hand near the collar when holding back words
turns the wrist outward whenever the motif appears
looks away first, then returns eye contact on the beat
presses the thumb against the prop during chorus peaks
holds the prop close to the chest during quiet lines
lets one sleeve fall over the hand in vulnerable moments
opens the palm slowly as the scene resolves
identity_locks: Do not use the previous song's face, hairstyle, outfit, body silhouette, or accessory set.
Treat this as a completely new lead character for this song, not a costume variation of another protagonist.
Make the head shape, hair length, body proportions, and outfit category visibly distinct from any other song.
Avoid generic dark-haired anime boy sameness; preserve the exact song-specific identity lock.
